Good morning Benjamin,

Thank you for your interest in Gray’s Landing. 227 is unfortunately not available at this time. We do currently have some availability in our 1 bedrooms if you would like more information on that.

Please let us know.

Thank you,


Grays Landing
Email: grayslanding@reachcdc.org

[cid:reachlogopms286c2_c401b797-c2cb-4800-9e3a-f2fe5d9f54c7.png]        <https://www.facebook.com/reachcdc>
<https://www.twitter.com/reachcdc>
 Learn more about our impactful work here.<https://reachcdc.org>

From: email@email.rentcafe.com <email@email.rentcafe.com>
Sent: Tuesday, March 31, 2026 8:20 PM
To: Grays Landing <grayslanding@reachcdc.org>
Subject: Reminder: Urgent, this RentCafe ILS prospect needs to move on 03.31.2026.

CAUTION External Email: Confirm Sender and Beware of Links and Attachments

[https://cdn.getblueshift.com/bee/images/25543c6e-5c0c-460e-960d-9a78a41a86e6/RentCafeLogo.png]<https://links.email.rentcafe.com/z/hp25kl4y033f04?uid=65097165-78f2-436d-ab99-2b3e1ad245bd&txnid=bf4920e9-196a-4475-9c3b-fed570439532&mid=d3a51f25-10ca-4a99-becb-e696f45f8332&bsft_aaid=d6d1f024-d1cc-432d-8466-1c40b5c01d0b&bsft_ek=2026-04-01T03%3A20%3A24Z&bsft_mime_type=html&bsft_tv=79&bsft_lx=1>





Hello,



Great news! you have a new lead interested in renting the 227 unit at gray's landing who is waiting for you to contact them.



Urgent, this prospect needs to move on 03.31.2026!






[cid:image004.png@01DCC1B6.4EAC0FE0]


[cid:image005.png@01DCC1B6.4EAC0FE0]




 





Prospect inquiry

 *   Reason for contacting: Submit Application

Unit details

 *   Name: 227
 *   Beds: 2
 *   Baths: 1 Bath
 *   Size: 917 Sqft
 *   Rent budget: $1,290

Property details

 *   Property Name: Gray's Landing

Prospect contact information

 *   Name: Benjamin Barber
 *   Email: starworks5@gmail.com<mailto:starworks5@gmail.com>
 *   Phone: +19712700855

Prospect preferences

 *   Move-in date: 2026-03-30

Prospect message

 *   Hi, i found unit 227 at gray's landing on rentcafe.com and i really like it. please contact me to discuss details about moving here.




[cid:image006.png@01DCC1B6.4EAC0FE0]


[cid:image005.png@01DCC1B6.4EAC0FE0]
